scene: A doodle stick figure in a dark spotlight confidently pressing one finger onto a glowing smartphone screen, sure of itself. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

An extreme magnified close-up of a fingertip touching a surface, revealing fuzzy glowing atoms as electron clouds with a tiny dark gap between them, never quite meeting. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
Two glowing atoms shown as electron clouds violently pushing apart from each other with crackling energy sparks between them, refusing to touch. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A doodle hand pressing down hard against a glowing surface, but a bright force-field cushion of energy glows in the gap, holding them apart. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure hovering a hair's width above the ground in a dramatic spotlight, a faint glowing force field beneath its feet, never actually touching the floor. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
